overall.description: A first-person night hike along a narrow dirt trail through a forested or grassland area. The path is illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp, revealing tall grass and scattered trees along the route. The footage has a handheld, amateur quality with natural movement and limited visibility beyond the light beam.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail, illuminating the path ahead with a flashlight while navigating between trees and tall grass

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through tall grass and trees
tall wild grass lining the left side of the trail
tall wild grass and bushes lining the right side of the trail
thin tree trunks scattered along both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a narrow dirt trail at night, illuminated by a handheld light source. Tall grass and scattered trees line both sides of the path, creating an enclosed feeling in the darkness. The walk is steady and continuous through this natural, empty environment with no other visible activity or structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a secluded dirt trail that maintains a sense of isolation within the nocturnal wilderness. It begins with the camera advancing steadily through a narrow path, where a handheld light source carves a tunnel of visibility out of the surrounding darkness. As the journey progresses, the beam reveals tall grass and scattered trees that press in from both sides, intensifying the enclosed feeling of the environment. The scene then persists in this rhythmic motion, gliding through the empty natural landscape without interruption or external distraction.
